description_long: This is a retro-style scooter with a pastel blue and white color scheme, featuring a rounded front fairing and a prominent circular headlight. The scooter is equipped with two side mirrors, a black seat, and a rear luggage rack loaded with bags and a rolled-up sleeping mat, suggesting it is ready for travel or commuting. The side panels are streamlined, and the wheels are covered with fenders matching the body color. The rear of the scooter includes a license plate, red taillight, and two side-mounted storage boxes. The handlebars are curved and fitted with black grips and mirrors. The overall design is compact, practical, and visually appealing, suitable for urban environments.
description: A pastel blue and white retro scooter with a front headlight, side mirrors, rear luggage rack, and side storage boxes, designed for urban travel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular headlight, curved handlebars with mirrors, and the pastel blue front fairing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black seat, rear luggage rack with bags, and the left side storage box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the luggage rack, bags, license plate, taillight, and both side storage boxes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the seat, right side storage box, and the arrangement of bags on the luggage rack.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, slightly curved, wide with a smooth surface and integrated footrest area
